decisions.decision: protocol='S3' and protocol='AZURE_BLOB' used instead of ROADMAP SC-5 protocol='STORAGE'
decisions.rationale: Locked design decisions D-05/D-06 in 28-CONTEXT.md supersede the draft ROADMAP text; more specific protocol values are functionally correct
GCS bucket rows already exist in gcp_endpoints from Phase 26; zero-API-call invariant is the intent; Phase 28 reuses without re-fetching
